return(function(F,C,t,e,P,V,Q,L,p,n,o,j,A,d,u,U,G,H,f,a,B,Z,K)H,a,d,p,o,n,L,f,u,B,A,j,K,G,U,Z=function(F,c)local C=d(c)local t=function(t,e,P,V)return o(F,{t;e,P;V},c,C)end return t end,function(F,c)local C=d(c)local t=function(t,e,P,V,Q,K,u,B,A,d)return o(F,{t;e,P;V;Q;K,u;B;A;d},c,C)end return t end,function(F)for c=-953871-(-953872),#F,10256+-10255 do
